intent.rawPrompt: Implement a real-time visual test run indicator in Intent Studio that displays active test status and state codes for AI-generated tests.

codeSurface.label: Intent Studio
codeSurface.rationale: The prompt targets Intent Studio run results, run status, or capture links inside intent-poc-app.

alternatives.label: Capture And Evidence
alternatives.reason: The issue may still involve capture outputs, but the broken behavior is in the Studio results UI.

alternatives.label: Surface Library
alternatives.reason: The request still references screenshots and could be mistaken for a library evidence task.

businessIntent.statement: Implement a real-time visual test run indicator in Intent Studio that displays active test status and state codes for AI-generated tests.
businessIntent.desiredOutcome: A persistent, real-time status indicator component in the Intent Studio header that displays the current execution state (e.g., 'Running', 'Passed', 'Failed') and associated state codes for AI-generated test runs.

acceptanceCriteria.description: A new status indicator component is integrated into the Intent Studio header.
The indicator updates in real-time based on the test execution lifecycle.
The component displays both human-readable status labels and technical state codes.
Visual evidence of the indicator in 'Running', 'Success', and 'Error' states is captured via Playwright.

scenarios.title: Display active test status during execution
scenarios.goal: Verify the indicator shows the correct status while a test is running.
given: The user is in Intent Studio
A test execution process has been triggered
when: The test runner reports an active status
then: The indicator shows the corresponding active state code

scenarios.title: Verify status indicator visual consistency
scenarios.goal: Ensure the indicator renders correctly in both light and dark themes.
given: The Intent Studio page is loaded
when: The theme is toggled between light and dark modes
The test status is set to 'Passed'
then: The status indicator maintains correct contrast and styling in both themes
The indicator displays 'Passed' and the success state code

workItems.title: Verify status indicator real-time execution states
workItems.description: Verify that the status indicator correctly transitions through execution states including RUNNING and displays the appropriate state codes.
workItems.userVisibleOutcome: The status indicator displays 'Running' and the correct state code during test execution.
workItems.verification: Use tracked-playwright to trigger a test run and assert the presence of the status indicator with the expected running state code.

specs.testName: Verify status indicator real-time execution states

repoContext: Intent Studio serves as the primary demo runtime for test status visualization.
adaptiveBoundaries: Indicator must integrate with existing Studio lifecycle hooks without disrupting current test execution flows.
minimumSuccess: Visual indicator appears in Studio during test runs, displaying accurate status and state codes.
baseline: Current Intent Studio UI lacks real-time test status feedback.
verificationObligations: Verify indicator visibility across both light and dark theme modes using the shared dark query-param contract.

plannerSections.title: IDD Plan
plannerSections.summary: Planner-owned business plan with acceptance criteria, repo context, execution lanes, and delivery notes.

plannerSections.title: IDD Source Lane: intent-poc-app
plannerSections.summary: Planner-owned lane for intent-poc-app, intended for downstream implementation and verification handoff.

sources.selectionReason: Source intent-poc-app was selected in the requested source scope.

destinations.label: Controller artifacts
destinations.reason: Local evidence bundles are always written by the controller.
details: Stores plan, manifests, logs, captures, and summaries on disk.

destinations.label: Source workspace publication
destinations.reason: Workspace publishing is disabled until artifacts.storageMode is set to 'both'.
details: Useful when evidence should live beside the source repository.

tools.label: BDD planning
tools.reason: The system converts the raw prompt into reviewable acceptance criteria and scenarios during the full reviewed plan pass.
details: Deterministic by default, with optional Gemini refinement when configured.

tools.label: Playwright TDD generation
tools.reason: Applicable sources now produce Playwright-first executable test plans and checkpoint screenshots.
details: Generated specs are intended for checked-in repo storage with overwrite semantics.

tools.label: Visual verification
tools.reason: Applicable sources currently expose visual checkpoints and capture definitions.
details: Playwright screenshots remain one execution tool rather than the top-level product model.

tools.label: Environment deployment
tools.reason: A generic local or Kubernetes deployment stage is planned but not yet wired into the runner.
details: This will become the shared path for local, minikube, and k3s-backed execution.

tools.label: Implementation loop
tools.reason: The runner can execute bounded implementation attempts against the prepared source workspace.
details: QA failures can feed directly back into the next bounded implementation attempt.

tools.label: QA verification
tools.reason: The runner can now execute a bounded QA bundle before evidence capture completes the lane.
details: The default QA bundle runs typecheck, the deterministic code test suite, and generated Playwright specs when a source enables them.

tools.label: Evidence reporting
tools.reason: Every run produces summaries and machine-readable manifests.
details: Reports become distribution inputs for downstream review and publishing surfaces.
